title: corybas calophyllus
intro: Corybas calophyllus, also known as the calypso orchid or purple fairy orchid, is a rare and endangered terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Corybas calophyllus are said to include wound healing, anti-bacterial protection, and soothing skin irritations, making it a potential remedy for minor cuts and scrapes. Herbal preparations of Corybas calophyllus are typically made by drying and powdering the plant, which can be used in creams, ointments, or teas to harness its medicinal properties.
